name: kicad-happy
description: KiCad electronics design skills. Analyze schematics, review PCB layouts, download datasheets, source components, and prep boards for fabrication.
shortDescription: AI-powered KiCad schematic analysis, PCB review, EMC checks, BOM management, and fab prep.
longDescription: Suite of 11 skills for electronics design with KiCad 5–10. Structured Python analysis (zero dependencies) for schematics, PCB layouts, and Gerbers. 40+ signal detectors, 42 EMC pre-compliance rules, SPICE simulation, thermal analysis, component sourcing (DigiKey/Mouser/LCSC/element14), BOM management, and manufacturing prep (JLCPCB/PCBWay). Professional documentation generation with kidoc.
